wizard.title: Create your vendor profile
wizard.subtitle: Tell us about your business so our admin team can review it.

success.title: Your profile is under review!
success.body: You'll get a notification once our team approves it.

locationCategories.title: Location and categories
locationCategories.categoriesHelp: Pick between 1 and 3 categories that represent your business.

languages.title: Languages
languages.label: Supported languages
languages.help: Pick at least one language you can serve clients in.

review.title: Review
review.intro: Please review the information before sending it for approval.

banner.pendingBody: Our team will review it shortly. You can edit it in the meantime.

edit.title: Edit my profile
edit.subtitle: Update your business details. Major changes require another review by our team.

repending.title: Your profile is under review again
repending.body: Major changes (business name or city) require another verification by our team.

confirmMajor.title: These changes will send your profile back to review
confirmMajor.description: Changing the business name or city requires another verification by our team. Continue?

delete.title: Delete your vendor profile?
delete.description: Your profile will no longer appear in the directory. You can contact our team to reactivate it later.

errors.PROFILE_REJECTED: Your profile was rejected. Resubmit it for approval from the corresponding option.
errors.PROFILE_HIDDEN: Your profile is hidden by an administrator. Contact us to reactivate it.
errors.PROFILE_NOT_FOUND: You don't have a profile yet.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please review the information you entered.
errors.AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: Only vendors can edit this profile.
errors.UNEXPECTED: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.bioLength: Description must be between 50 and 1000 characters.
validation.languagesRequired: Please pick at least one language.
validation.noFieldsToUpdate: Please change at least one field before saving.

errors.PROFILE_EXISTS: You already have a vendor profile. You can edit it from your profile page.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please review the information you entered.
errors.AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED: You need to sign in to create your profile.
errors.FORBIDDEN: Only vendors can create a vendor profile.
errors.UNEXPECTED: Something went wrong. Please try again.

portfolio.title: My portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Upload up to 10 images per work to showcase what you offer.
portfolio.empty: You haven't uploaded any portfolio images yet.

dropzone.placeholder: Drop an image here or press Enter to choose one
dropzone.helper: JPG, PNG or WebP. Up to 5 MB. Long side is resized to 2048 px.

delete.title: Delete this image from "{workLabel}"?
delete.description: Soft delete: the image will disappear from your portfolio immediately. We keep the metadata for auditing.

errors.ATTACHMENT_NOT_FOUND: This image is no longer available.
errors.INVALID_DELETION_REASON: The reason must be between 1 and 500 characters.
errors.PROFILE_HIDDEN: Your profile is hidden by an administrator. Contact us to reactivate it.
errors.PROFILE_NOT_FOUND: You don't have a vendor profile yet.
errors.AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: Only vendors can delete portfolio images.
errors.UNEXPECTED: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.INVALID_MIME: That file type isn't allowed. Use JPG, PNG or WebP.
errors.INVALID_IMAGE: We couldn't process that image. Try another one.
errors.INVALID_WORK_LABEL: The work name only accepts letters, digits, spaces, hyphens and underscores (1–80 characters).
errors.FILE_TOO_LARGE: The file exceeds the 5 MB limit.
errors.IMAGE_LIMIT_REACHED: This work already has the maximum of 10 images.
errors.WORK_LABEL_LIMIT_REACHED: You have reached the maximum of 20 works. Delete an existing one to add a new one.
errors.PROFILE_HIDDEN: Your profile is hidden by an administrator. Contact us to reactivate it.
errors.PROFILE_NOT_FOUND: You don't have a vendor profile yet.
errors.AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: Only vendors can upload portfolio images.
errors.UNEXPECTED: Something went wrong. Please try again.

change.title: Change my service categories
change.subtitle: Pick between 1 and 5 categories. Each accepted change requires another admin review.

counter.reached: You have reached the maximum of 5 category changes.

categories.label: Service categories
categories.help: Between 1 and 5 categories. Adding or removing any of them counts as one change.
categories.maxHelp: You can select up to {max} categories.

banners.noop: The set you sent matches your current categories — nothing changed.

repending.title: Your profile is under review again
repending.body: Category changes require another verification by our team before your profile is public again.

confirm.title: These changes will send your profile back to review
confirm.description: Any change to your service categories requires another verification by our team. Continue?

errors.CATEGORY_CHANGE_LIMIT: You have reached the maximum of 5 category changes. Contact support if you need to change again.
errors.INVALID_CATEGORIES: Please select between 1 and 5 unique categories.
errors.INVALID_CATEGORY: One or more categories are no longer available. Please refresh and try again.
errors.PROFILE_HIDDEN: Your profile is hidden by an administrator. Contact us to reactivate it.
errors.PROFILE_NOT_FOUND: You don't have a profile yet.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please review the information you entered.
errors.AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: Only vendors can change these categories.
errors.UNEXPECTED: Something went wrong. Please try again.

services.title: My packages and services
services.subtitle: Manage your catalog. Active packages appear on your public profile once your profile is approved.
services.empty: You have no packages yet. Create your first one so it shows up on your public profile once approved.

table.caption: Vendor package list
table.error: We could not load your packages. Please try again.

create.title: New package
create.subtitle: Fill in the package details. The price is a reference; the final quote is sent per request.

deactivate.title: Deactivate "{name}"
deactivate.body: The package will no longer appear on your public profile until you reactivate it. You can reactivate it any time.

errors.INVALID_PACKAGE_NAME: The name must be between 2 and 150 characters.
errors.INVALID_PRICE: The price must be a non-negative decimal with up to 2 decimals.
errors.INVALID_CURRENCY: The selected currency is not valid.
errors.INVALID_DESCRIPTION: The description must be between 10 and 2000 characters.
errors.INVALID_CATEGORY: That category is no longer available. Refresh and try again.
errors.SERVICE_LIMIT_REACHED: You've reached the maximum of 50 active packages. Deactivate one to add another.
errors.SERVICE_NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find that package. It may have been removed already.
errors.PROFILE_HIDDEN: Your profile is hidden by an administrator. Contact us to reactivate it.
errors.PROFILE_NOT_FOUND: You don't have a vendor profile yet.
errors.AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: Only vendors can manage the catalog.
errors.UNEXPECTED: Something went wrong. Please try again.
